prompt: Craft a modern typographic brand element: the phrase 'Innovate & Inspire' in a sleek, professional sans-serif font, rendered in metallic silver with a subtle gradient. This should be set against a clean white background that features minimal, abstract design accents for a sophisticated identity.
prompt_refined: Generate a modern, minimalist typographic brand logo. The phrase 'Innovate & Inspire' is the central element, rendered in a sleek, professional sans-serif font. The text features a metallic silver finish with a subtle gradient. This logo is set against a pristine white background that includes very subtle, abstract geometric design accents. The overall image should convey a sophisticated and clean aesthetic.
objects: sleek, professional sans-serif font (applied to text)
subtle, abstract geometric design accents (on background)
